_meta.purpose: Single source of truth untuk SEMUA konten teks/struktur website. Fail ini di-fetch oleh /js/data-loader.js dan di-render ke DOM oleh /js/ui-manager.js. JANGAN hardcode teks dalam index.html kecuali skeleton/landmark elements.

site.name: Browser Use
site.tagline: Make websites accessible for AI agents

hero.headline: The browser, made for AI agents
hero.subheadline: Give your AI agent reliable, fast, and secure access to the web. Built for developers who ship.

features.heading: Built for agentic browsing
features.subheading: Everything you need to automate the web, without the headaches.

items.title: Fast by default
items.description: Optimized DOM extraction and action execution so agents move at machine speed, not human speed.

items.title: Reliable element detection
items.description: Robust selector strategy that survives layout shifts, dynamic content, and shadow DOM.

items.title: Secure by design
items.description: Sandboxed sessions and scoped credentials keep agent actions isolated and auditable.

items.title: Extensible API
items.description: Plug into any LLM or agent framework with a small, well-documented surface area.

items.title: Full observability
items.description: Step-by-step traces, screenshots, and logs for every action your agent takes.

items.title: Open source
items.description: MIT licensed. Self-host or use the managed cloud — your choice, no lock-in.

items.title: Research agents
items.description: Crawl, extract, and summarize information across thousands of pages automatically.

items.title: QA & testing
items.description: Run end-to-end test agents that adapt to UI changes without brittle scripts.

items.title: Workflow automation
items.description: Automate repetitive web tasks: form filling, data entry, and back-office workflows.

items.title: Data collection
items.description: Structured scraping at scale with built-in rate limiting and retry logic.

pricing.heading: Simple pricing
pricing.subheading: Start free. Scale when you need to.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: For teams running agents in production.

items.quote: Cut our scraping maintenance time by more than half within the first month.
items.author: A. Rahman

items.quote: The observability tools alone saved us days of debugging flaky agents.
items.author: S. Tan

items.quote: Switched from a homegrown Selenium setup and never looked back.
items.author: M. Lee

links.title: Quickstart
links.description: Install and run your first agent in 5 minutes.

links.title: API Reference
links.description: Full reference for every method and event.

items.question: Is it open source?
items.answer: Yes, the core engine is MIT licensed and available on GitHub. The managed cloud is an optional paid add-on.

items.question: Which LLMs does it support?
items.answer: Any LLM that can call functions or tools — including Claude, GPT, and open-weight models.

items.question: Can I self-host?
items.answer: Yes. The Enterprise and Free tiers both support self-hosting on your own infrastructure.

items.question: Does it work with dynamic, JS-heavy sites?
items.answer: Yes. The engine waits for network idle and re-resolves selectors after DOM mutations.

items.question: Is there a rate limit?
items.answer: Free tier has a soft session limit. Pro and Enterprise tiers scale with usage.

newsletter.heading: Stay in the loop
